subject: [PATCH v6 05/22] mm/swap: add a new function to check if a swap entry is in swap cached.

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called is_swap_cached to check if a swap entry is in the swap cache. The function abstracts away the current implementation of checking the swap cached state, which will soon be managed at the virtual swap layer. It minimizes overhead by directly accessing the swap map using READ_ONCE. This change aims to simplify and future-proof the code for upcoming changes in swap cache management.
